semantic.role: Define and document project-specific naming conventions for code consistency in a monorepo environment.
responsibilities: Enforce interface naming rules (prefix 'I') for TypeScript type files under src/types/**/*.ts
Enforce test file naming rules (suffix .test.ts or .spec.ts) for test files under tests/**
Provide severity levels (Warning/Error) to guide automated checks
outOfScope: General code formatting and style rules not related to naming
Naming conventions for constants, functions, classes, or directories
Any conventions outside the specified file scopes

English.purpose: This document establishes clear naming rules to maintain a consistent and predictable codebase, especially within a large monorepo.
English.context_and_audience: It is intended for all developers contributing to the ArchSpine project, providing them with explicit standards for interface and test file naming to reduce ambiguity and improve maintainability.
key_takeaways: All internal interfaces must start with 'I' to distinguish them from types and classes.
All test files must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts to ensure compatibility with test runners.
These rules are enforced with automated tooling as defined by the severity levels.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档规定了明确的命名规则，以维护大型 monorepo 中代码库的一致性和可预测性。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 适用于所有参与 ArchSpine 项目的开发者，为他们提供接口和测试文件命名的明确标准，从而减少歧义并提高可维护性。
key_takeaways: 所有内部接口必须以 'I' 开头，以区别于类型和类。
所有测试文件必须以 .test.ts 或 .spec.ts 结尾，以确保与测试运行器的兼容性。
这些规则通过自动化工具强制执行，由严重级别定义。
